case_title: MAIDA WONG VS. LAURA COSTELLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WONG, MAIDA AS TO DEFENDANT COSTELLO, LAURA DBA SF REALTY GROUP WALKER, LANCE DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT 415, INC DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENTSF, DBA SF REALTY GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-18-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $70) SERVED MAR-07-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT WALKER, LANCE DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT 415, INC DBA PROPERTY MANAGEMENTSF, DBA SF REALTY GROUP

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF MAIDA WONG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT LAURA COSTELLO DBA SF REALTY GROUP IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT LANCE WALKER PROPERY MANAGEMENT AKA PROPERTY MANAGEMENT SF DBA SF REALTY GROUP IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT LAURA COSTELLO PRIOR TO THE HEARING THE PLAINTIFF DISMISSED THE CASE AGAINST DEFENDANT LAURA COSTELLO. PLAINTIFF WILL NOT WAIVE DAMAGES ABOVE $10,000. HONORABLE WILLIAM LYNN DISMISSES ENTIRE CASE WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-06-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-18-2021 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
